hooks.prompt:
BEFORE STOPPING — verify project health:
1. Backend: run `dotnet build` — if fails, fix errors.
2. Mobile: run `cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit` — if fails, fix.
3. Tests: run `dotnet test --verbosity minimal` and `cd apps/mobile && npx jest --silent` — if any fail, fix.
4. Check new files follow naming conventions.
5. Verify every feature has at least 1 test.
6. Update docs/taskboard/BOARD.md with current status.
7. Git commit any uncommitted work with proper format.
Fix ALL failures before stopping. Respond with ok only when everything passes.

hooks.command: bash -c 'cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && dotnet build --nologo --verbosity quiet 2>&1 | tail -3; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}'
